title: elymus brachyaristatus
intro: Elymus brachyaristatus, also known as Big Spurrey grass or Elymus brevis, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of China and India. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and expectorant effects, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Elymus brachyaristatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of fever and rheumatism. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water for its medicinal properties, and it may also be dried and used in herbal remedies or as a tincture.
